skill.name: background-remover
skill.description: AI Background Removal - Remove background from images, create transparent PNG, one-click background remover for e-commerce product photos, portrait headshots, design materials. Supports JPG, PNG, WebP local files and remote URLs.
skill.summary: Remove image backgrounds and create transparent PNGs using AI-powered background removal
skill.author: verging.ai

security_audit.summary: Static analysis detected 58 potential issues, all of which are false positives from documentation content. The 'external_commands' patterns are markdown code blocks showing curl examples, not actual code execution. Network patterns are legitimate API endpoint URLs in documentation. Environment variable access is standard API key configuration. No executable code or security risks found - this is a skill documentation file providing API usage instructions.

content.value_statement: Remove backgrounds from any image in seconds. Create transparent PNGs for product photos, portraits, and designs without manual editing.
actual_capabilities: Remove backgrounds from JPG, PNG, and WebP images up to 10MB
Process local image files or remote URLs
Handle e-commerce product photos and portrait headshots
Download processed images to local directory
limitations: Requires verging.ai API key and credits to process images
Requires curl command for API interactions
Processing time varies based on image complexity and server load
Cannot process animated images or video files

use_cases.title: E-commerce Product Photography
use_cases.description: Remove backgrounds from product photos to create clean, professional images for online stores. Process multiple product images quickly without manual editing.

use_cases.title: Professional Portrait Preparation
use_cases.description: Create professional headshots by removing distracting backgrounds from portraits. Perfect for LinkedIn profiles, corporate directories, and business cards.

use_cases.title: Graphic Design Material Creation
use_cases.description: Generate transparent images for marketing materials, social media graphics, and design projects. Extract subjects from photos for use in compositions.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Background Removal
prompt_templates.prompt: Remove the background from product-photo.jpg and save the result as a transparent PNG
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick single image processing with default settings

prompt_templates.title: Batch Processing
prompt_templates.prompt: Remove backgrounds from all images in the ./products folder and save each result with a '_no-bg' suffix
prompt_templates.scenario: Processing multiple product photos for an e-commerce catalog

prompt_templates.title: Remote Image Processing
prompt_templates.prompt: Download the image from https://example.com/photo.jpg, remove its background, and save the result to ./output/transparent.png
prompt_templates.scenario: Processing images hosted on remote servers or URLs

prompt_templates.title: Credit Check and Process
prompt_templates.prompt: Check my current credit balance, then if I have enough credits, remove the background from portrait.jpg and download the result
prompt_templates.scenario: Verifying account balance before processing to avoid errors

best_practices: Always check available credits before processing to avoid job failures
Use the --download flag to automatically save results to your local directory
Keep original image files as backups before processing
Process high-resolution images (minimum 800x800) for best quality results
Test with one image first before batch processing multiple files
anti_patterns: Don't process images larger than 10MB as they will be rejected
Don't forget to set the VERGING_API_KEY environment variable before starting
Don't interrupt the polling process - wait for job completion to get results
Don't process copyrighted images without proper authorization

faq.question: What image formats are supported?
faq.answer: The skill supports JPG/JPEG, PNG, and WebP formats up to 10MB in file size.

faq.question: Do I need an API key to use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes, you need a verging.ai API key. Get one free at verging.ai by logging in and navigating to API Keys in your profile menu.

faq.question: How much does it cost to remove backgrounds?
faq.answer: Each background removal costs 1 credit. Check your balance before processing to ensure you have enough credits.

faq.question: Can I process images from URLs?
faq.answer: Yes, the skill can download images from remote URLs and process them. Use the --image parameter with a full URL.

faq.question: Where are the processed images saved?
faq.answer: By default, results are returned as public URLs. Use the --download flag to save them locally, or specify --output to set a custom save path.

faq.question: What happens if I run out of credits mid-process?
faq.answer: The skill checks your credit balance before starting. If you have insufficient credits, it will prompt you to recharge before processing begins.
